title: PVP-Pack Resource
description: A comprehensive pvp resource pack. Suitable for minigames.
body: "Pack Resource" is a simple yet effective resource pack designed with the Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP community in mind. It's been optimized to make the PvP experience cleaner, more fluid, and more focused. Contrasts and clean lines are emphasized to give the player an advantage while maintaining visual simplicity. Critical items have been specifically redesigned for quick identification.Suitable for Bedwars and version 1.8.9 minigames.
